True Crime Byline: Sketches express softer side of Robert Pickton's victims   The new podcast True Crime Byline looks back at The Vancouver Sun investigation into Vancouver's missing women, a case that eventually led to the arrest and conviction of Robert Pickton. This story about forensic sketch artists' work to show a softer side of the women behind the mugshots was published Dec. 17, 2005.
